code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
mut evens = ""
mut odds = ""
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  let tok = match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(t)
    t
  when None
    ""
  end
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(n)
    if n % 2 == 0
      if string.is_empty(evens)
        evens = tok
      else
        evens = "#{evens} #{tok}"
      end
    else
      if string.is_empty(odds)
        odds = tok
      else
        odds = "#{odds} #{tok}"
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("evens=#{evens}")
println("odds=#{odds}")
